totalDataCenters.methodologyNote: Baxtel lists the Alabama data center market as having 40 data centers operated by 19 providers.

totalPlannedDataCenters.methodologyNote: Pending Cleanview import for planned Alabama projects.

totalUnderConstructionDataCenters.methodologyNote: Pending Cleanview import for under-construction Alabama projects.

totalPipelineDataCenters.methodologyNote: Pipeline equals planned plus under construction after Cleanview import.

providerCount.methodologyNote: Provider count from Baxtel's Alabama data center market facts.

largestKnownFacility.methodologyNote: Baxtel lists Google Bridgeport as the largest Alabama facility.

largestKnownFacilityMW.methodologyNote: Baxtel lists Google Bridgeport at 50 MW.
